scripts.init:env: env LDFLAGS="-L$(brew --prefix openssl)/lib" CFLAGS="-I$(brew --prefix openssl)/include -DPRAGMA_IGNORE_UNUSED_LABEL= -DPRAGMA_WARN_STRICT_PROTOTYPES=" SWIG_FEATURES="-cpperraswarn -I$(brew --prefix openssl)/include"
scripts.init:pip: .venv/bin/pip install pip setuptools wheel M2Crypto lxml black
scripts.init: npm install && npm run init:env && npm run init:venv && npm run init:pip && npm run init:driverpackager
scripts.fmt: npm run fmt:lua && npm run fmt:py && npm run fmt:md
scripts.preprocess: for build in $npm_package_config_distributions; do ./tools/preprocess --$build || exit 1; done
scripts.docs:html: for build in $npm_package_config_distributions; do for driver_dir in build/$build/drivers/*/; do generate-md --layout github --input "${driver_dir}www/documentation/index.md" --output "${driver_dir}www/documentation"; done; generate-md --layout github --input "build/$build/documentation/index.md" --output "build/$build/documentation"; done
scripts.docs:pdf: for build in $npm_package_config_distributions; do mkdir -p "dist/$build"; for driver_dir in build/$build/drivers/*/; do dir=$(basename "$driver_dir"); driver_display_name=$(xmlstarlet sel -t -v '/devicedata/name' "${driver_dir}driver.xml"); electron-pdf --marginsType 0 --input "$(pwd)/${driver_dir}www/documentation/index.html" --output "dist/$build/$driver_display_name Documentation.pdf"; done; electron-pdf --marginsType 0 --input "$(pwd)/build/$build/documentation/index.html" --output "dist/$build/Finite Labs Essentials Documentation.pdf"; done
scripts.docs:readme: rm -rf ./images && cp -r documentation/images . && pandoc build/oss/documentation/index.md -f gfm -t gfm --lua-filter=tools/pandoc-remove-style.lua -o README.md
scripts.docs: npm run docs:readme && npm run docs:html && npm run docs:pdf
scripts.update-driver.xml:version: for build in $npm_package_config_distributions; do for driver_dir in build/$build/drivers/*/; do xmlstarlet edit --inplace --omit-decl --update '/devicedata/version' --value "`date +'%Y%m%d'`" "${driver_dir}driver.xml"; done; done
scripts.update-driver.xml:modified: for build in $npm_package_config_distributions; do for driver_dir in build/$build/drivers/*/; do xmlstarlet edit --inplace --omit-decl --update '/devicedata/modified' --value "`date +'%m/%d/%Y %I:%M %p'`" "${driver_dir}driver.xml"; done; done
scripts.update-driver.xml: npm run update-driver.xml:version && npm run update-driver.xml:modified
scripts.gen-squishy: for build in $npm_package_config_distributions; do for driver_dir in build/$build/drivers/*/; do (cd "$driver_dir" && lua ../../../../tools/gen-squishy.lua) || exit 1; done; done
scripts.package: for build in $npm_package_config_distributions; do for driver_dir in build/$build/drivers/*/; do dir=$(basename "$driver_dir"); export pwd="$(pwd)" && cd "build/$build/drivers/$dir" && "$pwd/.venv/bin/python3" "$pwd/dist/driverpackager/dp3/driverpackager.py" . "$pwd/dist/$build" driver.c4zproj && cd "$pwd"; done; done
scripts.zip: for build in $npm_package_config_distributions; do cd "dist/$build" && zip $(basename "$(realpath "$(pwd)/../../")").zip *.{c4z,pdf} && cd ../../; done
scripts.build: for build in $npm_package_config_distributions; do rm -rf dist/$build || exit 1; done && npm run fmt && npm run preprocess && npm run gen-squishy && npm run update-driver.xml && npm run docs && npm run package && npm run zip
scripts.build:nodocs: npm run clean:build && npm run fmt && npm run preprocess && npm run gen-squishy && npm run update-driver.xml && npm run package
scripts.clean:build: for build in $npm_package_config_distributions; do rm -rfv "dist/$build";done && rm -rfv build
scripts.clean: npm run clean:build && rm -rfv dist node_modules .venv
